attempts.prompt:
You are helping a robotic planning task. 
    Given the image of a scene and an instruction, generate the PDDL file with objects, initial state, and goal specification.
    Your output should adhere to the constraints defined in the domain file.
    You must output the PDDL file in the correct format.
    Examples of PDDL problems given a different domain instruction:
    Domain: hanoi
    Instruction: Move all disks to the rightmost peg.
    PDDL problem:
    (define (problem hanoi3)
        (:domain hanoi)
        (:objects
            peg1
            peg2
            orange_disk1
            orange_disk2
        )
            (:init
                (clear orange_disk1)
                (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)
                (on orange_disk2 peg1)
            )
        (:goal (and (on orange_disk2 peg2) (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)))
    )
    
    For the current domain, this is the domain file:
    (define (domain put_task)
 (:requirements
  :adl
 )
 (:types
  agent
  microwave fridge sink - receptacle  ; an object is a receptacle if it can hold things
  knife receptacle - object           ; if not an receptacle, default to object
  )


 (:predicates
    (openable ?r - receptacle)                                ; true if a receptacle is openable
    (opened ?r - receptacle)                                  ; true if a receptacle is opened
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - object)                ; object ?o is in receptacle ?r
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)                            ; object ?o is held by agent ?a
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)                                     ; agent ?a holds an object
    (isClean ?o - object)                                     ; true if the object has been clean in sink
    (isHot ?o - object)                                       ; true if the object has been heated up
    (isCool ?o - object)                                      ; true if the object has been cooled
    (isOn ?o - object)                                        ; true if the object is on
    (isToggled ?o - object)                                   ; true if the object has been toggled
    (isSliced ?o - object)                                    ; true if the object is sliced
    (atLocation ?a - agent ?o - object)
 )

;; agent goes to receptacle
 (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?lEnd - object)
    :precondition (and
            (not (atLocation ?a ?lEnd))
            )
    :effect (and
                (atLocation ?a ?lEnd)
                (forall (?l - object)
                    (when (and (atLocation ?a ?l) (not (= ?l ?lEnd)))
                        (not (atLocation ?a ?l))))
                (forall (?l - object)
                     (when (inReceptacle ?l ?lEnd) (atLocation ?a ?l)))
            )
 )

;; agent opens receptacle
 (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (opened ?r)
            )
 )
;; agent closes receptacle
 (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            (opened ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (not (opened ?r))
            )

 )

;; agent picks up object
 (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
    :effect (and
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (forall (?r - receptacle)
                    (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                )
            )
 )

;; agent puts down an object in a receptacle
 (:action PutObjectInReceptacle
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
 )

;; agent cleans some object
 (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - sink ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isClean ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent heats-up some object
 (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - microwave ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isHot ?o)
            )
 )

;; agent cools some object
 (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - fridge ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isCool ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent toggle object
 (:action ToggleObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (when (isOn ?o)
                    (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o))
                    (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent slices some object with a knife
 (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?co - object ?ko - knife)
    :precondition
            (and
                (atLocation ?a ?co)
                (holds ?a ?ko)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isSliced ?co)
            )
 )


)
    
        The image of the scene has been provided.
        Please first analyze the image and then generate the PDDL problem.
        
    The robot is initially not at any object's location. It needs to first go to a location to interact with an object. If an object A can hold another object B, it is a receptacle and must be recognized as such.
    Instruction: place a cup with a fork in it on top of the kitchen island counter
    

SCENE CAPTION:
The scene depicts a kitchen environment with various objects and receptacles relevant to the planning task. The following is a detailed description based on the provided images and domain definitions:

1. Objects and their types:
   - Receptacles:
     - Sink: A stainless steel sink with a faucet, located on a green countertop. It is openable and currently not opened.
     - Microwave: Not visible in any of the images, so assumed not present or not relevant for this task.
     - Fridge: A black refrigerator is partially visible to the left of the sink in images 2 and 5. It is openable.
     - Stove: A white stove with two burners and an oven. The oven is a receptacle and is openable. The burners are not receptacles.
     - Countertops: The green countertops are surfaces but not defined as receptacles in the domain.
     - Kitchen Island Counter: A green countertop with a checkered pattern, visible in image 3. It is not defined as a receptacle but is the target location for the final placement.
     - Cabinets: Wooden cabinets under the sink and stove are not explicitly defined as receptacles in the domain.
   - Objects:
     - Knife: A knife is visible on the kitchen island counter in image 3. It is an object and not a receptacle.
     - Fork: A fork is visible in the sink in images 2 and 5, and also on the kitchen island counter in image 3. It is an object.
     - Cup: A cup is visible on the kitchen island counter in image 3, under the table. It is an object.
     - Lettuce: Two heads of lettuce are on the countertop next to the stove in images 1 and 4. They are objects.
     - Bowls: Two metal bowls are on the stove burners in images 1 and 4. They are objects.
     - Spoon: A spoon is visible in the sink in images 2 and 5. It is an object.
     - Egg: An egg is visible in the sink in images 2 and 5. It is an object.
     - Soap Dispenser: A soap dispenser is on the kitchen island counter in image 3. It is an object.
     - Pan: A pan is on the kitchen island counter in image 3. It is an object.
     - Chairs: Two wooden chairs are at the kitchen island in image 3. They are not relevant to the domain.

2. Quantities of each object type:
   - Receptacles: 3 (sink, fridge, stove oven)
   - Objects: 12 (knife, fork, cup, lettuce x2, bowls x2, spoon, egg, soap dispenser, pan, chairs x2 - but chairs are not relevant)

3. Spatial relationships between objects:
   - The sink contains a fork, spoon, and egg in images 2 and 5.
   - The stove has two bowls on its burners in images 1 and 4.
   - The kitchen island counter has a cup, fork, knife, pan, soap dispenser, and bowls in image 3.
   - The fridge is to the left of the sink in images 2 and 5.
   - The lettuce is on the countertop next to the stove in images 1 and 4.

4. Current state of each object relevant to the planning task:
   - The fork is in the sink and is not clean (not isClean).
   - The cup is on the kitchen island counter and is not held by the agent.
   - The knife is on the kitchen island counter and is not held by the agent.
   - The sink is not opened.
   - The fridge is not opened.
   - The stove oven is not opened.
   - No objects are held by the agent initially.
   - No objects are sliced, heated, cooled, or toggled.

5. Colors, positions, and other visual properties:
   - The sink is stainless steel with a bronze faucet.
   - The countertops are green.
   - The stove is white with black burners.
   - The fridge is black.
   - The kitchen island counter has a green checkered pattern.
   - The cup is white and is under the table on the kitchen island.
   - The fork is silver and is in the sink.
   - The knife is silver and is on the kitchen island counter.
   - The lettuce is green.
   - The bowls are metal and shiny.
   - The spoon is silver and is in the sink.
   - The egg is white.
   - The soap dispenser is silver with a black pump.
   - The pan is black.
   - The chairs are wooden and brown.

The task requires placing a cup with a fork in it on top of the kitchen island counter. The fork is currently in the sink and needs to be cleaned and then placed in the cup, which is already on the kitchen island counter. The agent must first go to the sink, pick up the fork, clean it, then go to the kitchen island counter, and put the fork in the cup.

Based on the above scene caption, the images, and the instruction, generate the PDDL problem file.
Use the caption to understand what objects are present and their current state.
Make sure the PDDL problem accurately reflects the scene described in the caption.

Generate the PDDL problem:
attempts.response:
```pddl
(define (problem put_task_problem)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        agent1 - agent
        sink1 - sink
        fridge1 - fridge
        stove1 - microwave  ; Using microwave type for stove as per domain, though it's a stove in reality
        cup1 - object
        fork1 - object
        knife1 - knife
        lettuce1 - object
        lettuce2 - object
        bowl1 - object
        bowl2 - object
        spoon1 - object
        egg1 - object
        soap_dispenser1 - object
        pan1 - object
        kitchen_island_counter - object  ; Not a receptacle, just a location
    )
    (:init
        (openable sink1)
        (openable fridge1)
        (openable stove1)
        (not (opened sink1))
        (not (opened fridge1))
        (not (opened stove1))
        (inReceptacle fork1 sink1)
        (inReceptacle spoon1 sink1)
        (inReceptacle egg1 sink1)
        (inReceptacle bowl1 stove1)
        (inReceptacle bowl2 stove1)
        (not (holdsAny agent1))
        (not (isClean fork1))
        (not (isHot fork1))
        (not (isCool fork1))
        (not (isOn fork1))
        (not (isSliced fork1))
        (not (isClean cup1))
        (not (isHot cup1))
        (not (isCool cup1))
        (not (isOn cup1))
        (not (isSliced cup1))
        (atLocation agent1 kitchen_island_counter)  ; Starting location for agent
    )
    (:goal (and
        (inReceptacle fork1 cup1)
        (atLocation agent1 kitchen_island_counter)
    ))
)
```

(define (problem put_task_problem)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        agent1 - agent
        sink1 - sink
        fridge1 - fridge
        stove1 - microwave  ; Using microwave type for stove as per domain, though it's a stove in reality
        cup1 - object
        fork1 - object
        knife1 - knife
        lettuce1 - object
        lettuce2 - object
        bowl1 - object
        bowl2 - object
        spoon1 - object
        egg1 - object
        soap_dispenser1 - object
        pan1 - object
        kitchen_island_counter - object  ; Not a receptacle, just a location
    )
    (:init
        (openable sink1)
        (openable fridge1)
        (openable stove1)
        (not (opened sink1))
        (not (opened fridge1))
        (not (opened stove1))
        (inReceptacle fork1 sink1)
        (inReceptacle spoon1 sink1)
        (inReceptacle egg1 sink1)
        (inReceptacle bowl1 stove1)
        (inReceptacle bowl2 stove1)
        (not (holdsAny agent1))
        (not (isClean fork1))
        (not (isHot fork1))
        (not (isCool fork1))
        (not (isOn fork1))
        (not (isSliced fork1))
        (not (isClean cup1))
        (not (isHot cup1))
        (not (isCool cup1))
        (not (isOn cup1))
        (not (isSliced cup1))
        (atLocation agent1 kitchen_island_counter)  ; Starting location for agent
    )
    (:goal (and
        (inReceptacle fork1 cup1)
        (atLocation agent1 kitchen_island_counter)
    ))
)

SCENE CAPTION:
The scene is a kitchen environment with multiple surfaces and appliances. The primary goal is to place a cup with a fork inside it onto the kitchen island counter. Below is a detailed description of relevant objects, their types, spatial relationships, and states, based on the domain definitions and visual evidence.

---

**1. Objects and Their Types**

- **Receptacles (can hold things):**
  - **Sink**: A stainless steel sink embedded in a green countertop, with a faucet. It contains a spoon, a small funnel-like object, and a white egg. It is a receptacle and is openable.
  - **Microwave**: Not visible in any image, so assumed not present or not in current scene.
  - **Fridge**: A black refrigerator partially visible on the left side of the sink view. It is a receptacle and openable.
  - **Stove**: A white electric stove with two square pans on the burners. It is not a receptacle in the domain sense (no indication it can hold items like a cup or fork).
  - **Cabinets**: Wooden cabinets under the sink and stove. They are receptacles and openable, but no contents are visible.
  - **Dishwasher**: A white appliance under the counter to the left of the stove. It is a receptacle and openable.
  - **Kitchen Island Counter**: A green checkered countertop with chairs around it. It is not a receptacle (it’s a surface, not designed to hold things internally) but is the target location for placing the cup with fork.

- **Objects (not receptacles):**
  - **Knife**: A silver knife on the kitchen island counter near a fork and a melon. It is an object of type `knife`.
  - **Fork**: A silver fork on the kitchen island counter. It is an object.
  - **Cup**: A small white cup on the kitchen island counter, near the edge. It is an object.
  - **Pans**: Two square metal pans on the stove. They are objects, not receptacles in the domain.
  - **Melon**: A green melon on the kitchen island counter. It is an object.
  - **Egg**: A white egg in the sink. It is an object.
  - **Spoon**: A spoon in the sink. It is an object.
  - **Funnel**: A small metal funnel in the sink. It is an object.
  - **Coffee Maker**: A red coffee maker on the counter to the left of the stove. It is an object.
  - **Lettuce Heads**: Two green lettuce heads on the counter next to the stove. They are objects.

---

**2. Quantities of Each Object Type**

- **Receptacles**: 5 (Sink, Fridge, Cabinets under sink, Cabinets under stove, Dishwasher)
- **Knives**: 1 (on kitchen island)
- **Forks**: 1 (on kitchen island)
- **Cups**: 1 (on kitchen island)
- **Pans**: 2 (on stove)
- **Melons**: 1 (on kitchen island)
- **Eggs**: 1 (in sink)
- **Spoons**: 1 (in sink)
- **Funnel**: 1 (in sink)
- **Coffee Maker**: 1 (on counter)
- **Lettuce Heads**: 2 (on counter)

---

**3. Spatial Relationships (Matching Domain Predicates)**

- **AtLocation**: The robot is not initially at any object’s location. It must first go to an object to interact.
- **InReceptacle**:
  - The spoon, egg, and funnel are in the sink.
  - No objects are visibly in the fridge, cabinets, or dishwasher.
- **Opened/Closed**: No receptacles are shown as opened or closed; they are assumed closed unless acted upon.
- **Holds/HoldsAny**: No agent is holding any object; holdsAny is false for the robot.
- **IsClean**: No objects are marked as clean; the spoon and egg in the sink may be candidates for cleaning.
- **IsHot/IsCool**: No objects are marked as hot or cool.
- **IsOn**: The stove burners may be on (indicated by glowing elements under the pans), but not explicitly stated in domain predicates for objects.
- **IsSliced**: No objects are sliced.
- **IsToggled**: No objects are toggled.

---

**4. Current State of Each Object Relevant to the Planning Task**

- **Cup**: Located on the kitchen island counter. It is not held by the robot, not in a receptacle, and not cleaned or heated.
- **Fork**: Located on the kitchen island counter. It is not held by the robot, not in a receptacle, and not cleaned or heated.
- **Sink**: Contains objects (spoon, egg, funnel). It is a receptacle and can be used to clean objects.
- **Fridge**: Partially visible; can be used to cool objects.
- **Knife**: On the kitchen island; can be used to slice objects.
- **Stove**: Has pans on it; can be used to heat objects if a microwave were present (but microwave is not visible).

---

**5. Colors, Positions, and Distinguishing Features**

- **Cup**: Small, white, cylindrical, on the right side of the kitchen island counter.
- **Fork**: Silver, standard dinner fork, next to the cup on the kitchen island.
- **Knife**: Silver, with a black handle, on the kitchen island near the melon.
- **Melon**: Green, round, on the kitchen island, near the fork and knife.
- **Sink**: Stainless steel, rectangular, with a faucet, in the center of the green countertop under the window.
- **Fridge**: Black, tall, on the far left, partially visible next to the sink.
- **Stove**: White, with two black burners, each holding a square metal pan. Located against the back wall.
- **Cabinets**: Wooden, brown, under the sink and stove.
- **Dishwasher**: White, under the counter to the left of the stove.
- **Coffee Maker**: Red, on the counter to the left of the stove, near the lettuce heads.
- **Lettuce Heads**: Green, round, on the counter next to the coffee maker.

---

**Summary for Planning**

To achieve the goal of placing a cup with a fork in it on the kitchen island counter, the robot must:
1. Go to the kitchen island to pick up the fork.
2. Pick up the fork.
3. Go to the cup (also on the kitchen island).
4. Put the fork into the cup (though the cup is not a receptacle in the domain, it can be treated as such for this task, or the domain may need adjustment).
5. Place the cup (with fork inside) back on the kitchen island counter.

Note: The domain does not define a cup as a receptacle, so the action `PutObjectInReceptacle` may not apply directly. The robot may need to simply place the fork into the cup as a surface interaction, which is not covered by the current domain predicates. This may require an extension to the domain or a reinterpretation of the task.

attempts.prompt:
You are helping a robotic planning task. 
    Given the image of a scene and an instruction, generate the PDDL file with objects, initial state, and goal specification.
    Your output should adhere to the constraints defined in the domain file.
    You must output the PDDL file in the correct format.
    Examples of PDDL problems given a different domain instruction:
    Domain: hanoi
    Instruction: Move all disks to the rightmost peg.
    PDDL problem:
    (define (problem hanoi3)
        (:domain hanoi)
        (:objects
            peg1
            peg2
            orange_disk1
            orange_disk2
        )
            (:init
                (clear orange_disk1)
                (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)
                (on orange_disk2 peg1)
            )
        (:goal (and (on orange_disk2 peg2) (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)))
    )
    
    For the current domain, this is the domain file:
    (define (domain put_task)
 (:requirements
  :adl
 )
 (:types
  agent
  microwave fridge sink - receptacle  ; an object is a receptacle if it can hold things
  knife receptacle - object           ; if not an receptacle, default to object
  )


 (:predicates
    (openable ?r - receptacle)                                ; true if a receptacle is openable
    (opened ?r - receptacle)                                  ; true if a receptacle is opened
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - object)                ; object ?o is in receptacle ?r
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)                            ; object ?o is held by agent ?a
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)                                     ; agent ?a holds an object
    (isClean ?o - object)                                     ; true if the object has been clean in sink
    (isHot ?o - object)                                       ; true if the object has been heated up
    (isCool ?o - object)                                      ; true if the object has been cooled
    (isOn ?o - object)                                        ; true if the object is on
    (isToggled ?o - object)                                   ; true if the object has been toggled
    (isSliced ?o - object)                                    ; true if the object is sliced
    (atLocation ?a - agent ?o - object)
 )

;; agent goes to receptacle
 (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?lEnd - object)
    :precondition (and
            (not (atLocation ?a ?lEnd))
            )
    :effect (and
                (atLocation ?a ?lEnd)
                (forall (?l - object)
                    (when (and (atLocation ?a ?l) (not (= ?l ?lEnd)))
                        (not (atLocation ?a ?l))))
                (forall (?l - object)
                     (when (inReceptacle ?l ?lEnd) (atLocation ?a ?l)))
            )
 )

;; agent opens receptacle
 (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (opened ?r)
            )
 )
;; agent closes receptacle
 (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            (opened ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (not (opened ?r))
            )

 )

;; agent picks up object
 (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
    :effect (and
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (forall (?r - receptacle)
                    (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                )
            )
 )

;; agent puts down an object in a receptacle
 (:action PutObjectInReceptacle
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
 )

;; agent cleans some object
 (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - sink ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isClean ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent heats-up some object
 (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - microwave ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isHot ?o)
            )
 )

;; agent cools some object
 (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - fridge ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isCool ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent toggle object
 (:action ToggleObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (when (isOn ?o)
                    (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o))
                    (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent slices some object with a knife
 (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?co - object ?ko - knife)
    :precondition
            (and
                (atLocation ?a ?co)
                (holds ?a ?ko)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isSliced ?co)
            )
 )


)

```pddl
(define (problem place_cup_with_fork)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        robot - agent
        sink - receptacle
        fridge - receptacle
        microwave - receptacle
        cup - object
        fork - object
        knife - knife
        kitchen_island_counter - object
        shelf_under_island - receptacle
    )
    (:init
        (atLocation robot kitchen_island_counter)
        (inReceptacle cup shelf_under_island)
        (inReceptacle fork sink)
        (openable sink)
        (openable fridge)
        (openable microwave)
        (not (opened sink))
        (not (opened fridge))
        (not (opened microwave))
        (not (holdsAny robot))
        (not (isClean fork))
        (not (isHot fork))
        (not (isCool fork))
        (not (isSliced fork))
        (not (isToggled fork))
        (not (isClean cup))
        (not (isHot cup))
        (not (isCool cup))
        (not (isSliced cup))
        (not (isToggled cup))
    )
    (:goal
        (and
            (inReceptacle fork cup)
            (inReceptacle cup kitchen_island_counter)
        )
    )
)
```

    (opened ?r - receptacle)                                  ; true if a receptacle is opened
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - object)                ; object ?o is in receptacle ?r
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)                            ; object ?o is held by agent ?a
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)                                     ; agent ?a holds an object
    (isClean ?o - object)                                     ; true if the object has been clean in sink
    (isHot ?o - object)                                       ; true if the object has been heated up
    (isCool ?o - object)                                      ; true if the object has been cooled
    (isOn ?o - object)                                        ; true if the object is on
    (isToggled ?o - object)                                   ; true if the object has been toggled
    (isSliced ?o - object)                                    ; true if the object is sliced
    (atLocation ?a - agent ?o - object)
 )

;; agent goes to receptacle
 (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?lEnd - object)
    :precondition (and
            (not (atLocation ?a ?lEnd))
            )
    :effect (and
                (atLocation ?a ?lEnd)
                (forall (?l - object)
                    (when (and (atLocation ?a ?l) (not (= ?l ?lEnd)))
                        (not (atLocation ?a ?l))))
                (forall (?l - object)
                     (when (inReceptacle ?l ?lEnd) (atLocation ?a ?l)))
            )
 )

;; agent opens receptacle
 (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (opened ?r)
            )
 )
;; agent closes receptacle
 (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            (opened ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (not (opened ?r))
            )

 )

;; agent picks up object
 (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
    :effect (and
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (forall (?r - receptacle)
                    (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                )
            )
 )

;; agent puts down an object in a receptacle
 (:action PutObjectInReceptacle
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
 )

;; agent cleans some object
 (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - sink ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isClean ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent heats-up some object
 (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - microwave ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isHot ?o)
            )
 )

;; agent cools some object
 (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - fridge ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isCool ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent toggle object
 (:action ToggleObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (when (isOn ?o)
                    (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o))
                    (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent slices some object with a knife
 (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?co - object ?ko - knife)
    :precondition
            (and
                (atLocation ?a ?co)
                (holds ?a ?ko)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isSliced ?co)
            )
 )


)

Generate the PDDL problem:
final.response:
```pddl
(define (problem place_cup_with_fork)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        robot - agent
        sink - receptacle
        fridge - receptacle
        microwave - receptacle
        cup - object
        fork - object
        knife - knife
        kitchen_island_counter - object
        shelf_under_island - receptacle
    )
    (:init
        (atLocation robot kitchen_island_counter)
        (inReceptacle cup shelf_under_island)
        (inReceptacle fork sink)
        (openable sink)
        (openable fridge)
        (openable microwave)
        (not (opened sink))
        (not (opened fridge))
        (not (opened microwave))
        (not (holdsAny robot))
        (not (isClean fork))
        (not (isHot fork))
        (not (isCool fork))
        (not (isSliced fork))
        (not (isToggled fork))
        (not (isClean cup))
        (not (isHot cup))
        (not (isCool cup))
        (not (isSliced cup))
        (not (isToggled cup))
    )
    (:goal
        (and
            (inReceptacle fork cup)
            (inReceptacle cup kitchen_island_counter)
        )
    )
)
```
final.problem:
(define (problem place_cup_with_fork)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        robot - agent
        sink - receptacle
        fridge - receptacle
        microwave - receptacle
        cup - object
        fork - object
        knife - knife
        kitchen_island_counter - object
        shelf_under_island - receptacle
    )
    (:init
        (atLocation robot kitchen_island_counter)
        (inReceptacle cup shelf_under_island)
        (inReceptacle fork sink)
        (openable sink)
        (openable fridge)
        (openable microwave)
        (not (opened sink))
        (not (opened fridge))
        (not (opened microwave))
        (not (holdsAny robot))
        (not (isClean fork))
        (not (isHot fork))
        (not (isCool fork))
        (not (isSliced fork))
        (not (isToggled fork))
        (not (isClean cup))
        (not (isHot cup))
        (not (isCool cup))
        (not (isSliced cup))
        (not (isToggled cup))
    )
    (:goal
        (and
            (inReceptacle fork cup)
            (inReceptacle cup kitchen_island_counter)
        )
    )
)
